events_log.event: Martian day 32 has begun
Exploration team located a viable underground ice source. Irina Vale extracted 34 units, Marco Quinn 32, and Zoya Kade 27 units of water for colony reserves.
AI directive: Solar Flare Boosts Energy Output

Martian day 34 has begun

A trading vessel from Earth has docked, delivering 100 units of food and 50 units of materials to the colony's global reserves. This influx bolsters our resource pool as Mars Sol 34 progresses under stable conditions.
AI directive: Solar Activity Boosts Power Output
Martian day 35 has begun
🌪️ Dust storm damaged colonies!
Despite the ongoing dust storm, a trading ship from Earth has docked successfully, delivering +100 units of food and +50 units of materials to our global reserves.
On Sol 35, despite active dust storm and -31C temperatures, the Earth trading ship docked successfully, delivering +100 food and +50 materials to the colony reserves.

daily_event.headline: Solar Activity Boost Enhances Energy Output
daily_event.summary: Solar activity has risen to 72%, improving solar panel efficiency and increasing energy availability across all colonies.

missions.title: Optimize Solar Panel Arrays
missions.briefing: With the recent solar activity surge, colonies can capitalize on increased solar energy generation by recalibrating and cleaning panels.
missions.objective: Perform maintenance and recalibration on solar panels to boost energy output by 10%.
missions.risk: Minimal risk of equipment damage during maintenance.

missions.title: Water Conservation Protocol
missions.briefing: Water resources remain critical. Implementing stricter conservation measures will ensure longer sustainability.
missions.objective: Establish water recycling and rationing procedures to reduce water consumption by 15%.
missions.reward_hint: Preserved water resources for future use.
missions.risk: Possible minor discomfort for colonists adjusting to strict…

missions.title: Materials Inventory Audit
missions.briefing: Materials stockpiles need auditing to identify unused or surplus items that could be repurposed or redistributed.
missions.objective: Conduct a full materials inventory and report opportunities for reuse or redistribution.
missions.reward_hint: Improved materials efficiency and potential resource gains.
missions.risk: Time-consuming task that may delay other activities.

npc_transmissions.message: Solar activity levels have increased. Colonies are advised to maximize energy harvesting and report any system anomalies.
Requesting assistance with materials transfer to balance resources for upcoming projects.

ai.news_summary: As Mars enters early spring on Sol 47, solar activity has increased, boosting energy generation potential for all colonies. Water conservation remains a priority due to limited reserves. Colonies are focusing on resource optimization to sustain operations amid the cold condition…
